title: Reef Fortress
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Structure |image=[[File:Reef_Fortress.jpg]] |name=Reef Fortress |constructed= |destroyed= |type=[[Fortress/Legends|Fortress]]''[[Young Jedi Knights: Lightsabers]]'' |location=[[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]] |interest= |rebuilt= |builder= |height= |width= |affiliation=[[Hapan Royal House]] }} {{Quote|Master Lowbacca wishes to inquire whether that island up ahead is our final destination.''"
"''Yes, that is Reef Fortress.|[[M-TD]], Lowbacca's [[Translator droid/Legends|translator droid]], and Ta'a Chume|}} '''Reef Fortress''' was the isolated stronghold of the [[Hapan Royal House|Hapan Royal Family]], on a small [[Reef Fortress Island|island]] in an [[Unidentified Hapan ocean|ocean]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]]. In [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]], [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi trainees]] [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]], [[Lowbacca]], [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] stayed at the [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]]. While they were there, [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Yfra]] tried to [[Death/Legends|kill]] them by sending their [[Hapan Water Dragon|wavespeeder]] into a patch of dangerous [[carnivorous seaweed]]. After escaping from the [[Seaweed/Legends|seaweed]], the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Raid on Reef Fortress|saved]] the [[Hapan]] [[Matriarch/Legends|matriarch]], [[Ta'a Chume]], from [[Bartokk]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] sent by the ambassador, thereby foiling Yfra's plot to overthrow the Hapan [[Queen/Legends|monarchy]]. Reef Fortress was also the location of an [[honor duel]] between [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Isolder]] and [[Archon (Vergill)|Archon]] [[Beed Thane]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. This [[Honor duel on Hapes|duel]] decided the role of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|war]] against the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. ==Description== {{Dialogue|Jacen|Hey, if you know of any secret passages that lead out of here, now might be the time to tell us.|Ta'a Chume|There are none. This tower room was designed as a protected chamber, with no secret ways for an assassin to gain entrance. Reef Fortress itself was built to be impregnable.|Jaina|Maybe you better fire your [[Architect/Legends|architect]].|attr=Jacen, Jaina, and Ta'a Chume, trapped in the latter's bedchamber by Bartokk assassins|src=}} Reef Fortress was the private shoreside retreat of the [[Hapan Royal House|Royal Family of Hapes]]. Located on a small, isolated [[Reef Fortress Island|island]] in an [[Unidentified Hapan ocean|ocean]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]] that was accessible only by [[Boat/Legends|boat]]{{CSWECite|III|88|Reef Fortress}} and surrounded by reefs, the thick-walled [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]] served as a stronghold in [[Time/Legends|times]] of emergency and was built to be impregnable. The fortress had high walls with [[Autoturret/Legends|turrets]] on the corners and was protected by a [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]]. There was a [[Power generator/Legends|generator]] station near the fortress that provided the fort with power and included backup generators and a [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generator]]. It had a stone [[Cave/Legends|cave]] grotto where boats were anchored and was near a small swimming cove. By [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]], the fortress contained a tower room that was the [[Sleeper (furniture)|bedchamber]] of the [[Matriarch/Legends|matriarch]], [[Ta'a Chume]]. There were no secret passages leading into this room because it was feared that [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] could use them to gain entrance. ==History== {{Quote|I can't wait to show you my home.|Tenel Ka, to Jacen, Jaina, and Lowbacca, about Reef Fortress|}} As a young [[Gender/Legends|girl]], [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]], the [[Hapan]] [[Prince/Legends|princess]], spent much time with her [[Parent/Legends|parents]] relaxing at Reef Fortress, which she thought of as a [[Summer/Legends|summer]] home. Later, in 23 ABY, Tenel Ka returned to the fortress with [[Lowbacca]], [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], her fellow [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi trainees]] from [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi Praxeum]], because a [[Bomb/Legends|bomb]] had gone off in the Hapan [[Matriarch/Legends|matriarch's]] royal residence, [[Fountain Palace]], where they had been staying. [[Yfra]], the personal [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] of the matriarch Ta'a Chume, and some [[Hapan Royal Guard|Hapan Honor Guards]] went with the youths to watch over them. During their stay there, the youths spent much of their time swimming in a small cove. However, Ta'a Chume, Tenel Ka's grandmother, would not let Tenel Ka shun all her responsibilities as the princess of Hapes and had her negotiate with a [[Mairan/Legends|Mairan]] [[Unidentified Mairan ambassador|ambassador]]. Later, Yfra suggested that Jacen, Jaina, Lowbacca, and Tenel Ka should take one of the [[Hapan Water Dragon|wavespeeders]] out on the [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] for a while. Unbeknownst to them, Yfra had programmed the wavespeeder to take them into an area of dangerous [[carnivorous seaweed]], hoping to [[Death/Legends|kill]] them as part of her plot to overthrow the Hapan Royal Family. The youths were able to escape from the [[Seaweed/Legends|seaweed]] using their [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] and [[Knife/Legends|knives]], and Jaina and Lowbacca manually drove the wavespeeder back to the island. Later, Ta'a Chume arrived at the fortress in her own royal wavespeeder. That [[Standard day/Legends|night]], [[Bartokk]] assassins sent by Yfra [[Raid on Reef Fortress|invaded]] Reef Fortress, destroying the shield generator and cutting off all power to the fortress. The assassins targeted Ta'a Chume and trapped her in her bedchamber. Together, Jacen, Jaina, Lowbacca, and Tenel Ka rescued the matriarch and escaped out the [[Window/Legends|window]] of her bedchamber. Then, seeing that there was no safe place nearby, they fled the island on a small wavespeeder, with the assassins following in their [[Assault boat/Legends|assault boat]]. After navigating the [[Dragon's Teeth]], a cluster of sharp rocks jutting out of the ocean, Jaina and Lowbacca purposefully [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] the wavespeeder into some [[Diet/Legends|carnivorous]] seaweed, which killed the assassins who were following them. Ta'a Chume then drove the wavespeeder to Fountain Palace, arriving in time to stop Yfra from promoting herself as the monarch. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], Prince [[Isolder]] and [[Archon (Vergill)|Archon]] [[Beed Thane]] participated in an [[honor duel]] at Reef Fortress. The [[Honor duel on Hapes|duel]] was initiated by Isolder slapping Thane across the face for insulting both [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] Ambassador [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and Tenel Ka, who was Isolder's daughter. Isolder won the duel during a sudden death round that the [[Unidentified referee|referee]] had called. As a result of the duel, the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] decided to enter the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|war]] against the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaders.''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' ==Behind the scenes== Reef Fortress first appeared in the [[1996]] ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Lightsabers]]'', by [[Kevin J. Anderson]] and [[Rebecca Moesta]]. Reef Fortress was given its own entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' in [[2008]]. However, this entry contains an error, stating that Leia Organa Solo was at Reef Fortress in 23 ABY with her children, when, according to ''Lightsabers'', she was on the world of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Young Jedi Knights: Lightsabers]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Fortaleza del Arrecife }} [[Category:Hapes locations]]
